blocks.title: DeterministicFollowUps
rows: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the digital signature requirement.

resultPayload.note: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.

evidence.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
evidence.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the presence of a digital signature from the site supervisor in the report creation process. While the linked use case mentions that the site supervisor signs the report digitally, there is no explicit evidence provided that confirms the functionality of the digital signature feature itself, such as the method of signing or the system's handling of the signature. This lack of concrete evidence indicates a gap in the requirement coverage for the digital signature functionality.
gaps: No explicit evidence confirming the functionality of the digital signature feature.
